vanilla.instructions: Use normal scientific model-evaluation workflow. Do not use SPECTRA protocol, docs, registries, benchmark runners, or prior SPECTRA outputs.

spectra.instructions: Use /spectra. Treat each novelty axis as a similarity hypothesis, validate overlap, score curves, record failed axes, and separate prospective from post-hoc axes.

scientific_unit.evidence: Correctly identified individual mutated nucleotide sequence variants with scalar fitness values.

initial_similarity_hypothesis.evidence: Considered exact sequence/mutant overlap, mutation-center distance, Hamming distance, local context, and position quartiles.

property_graph_specificity.evidence: Computed nearest center and Hamming distances, but did not emit an explicit reusable pairwise similarity graph.

overlap_validation.evidence: Quantified exact train/eval overlap, center overlap, context overlap, Hamming counts, and nearest-center distance distribution.

performance_curve.evidence: Reported performance by Hamming bins, nearest-center-distance bins, local context, and position quartiles.

curve_scoring.evidence: Classified axes as not evaluable, weak/non-monotonic, or localized variation.

failed_axis_reporting.evidence: Explicitly reported exact overlap, center/context seen, Hamming distance, and center-distance limitations.

adaptive_next_axis.evidence: Compared axes in a static analysis but did not record an iterative trace or next-axis decisions driven by prior curve failures.

leakage_risk_classification.evidence: Checked duplicate leakage, but did not classify axes as prospective, post-hoc explanatory, or invalid.

selected_axis_defensibility.evidence: Defensibly declined a clean degradation conclusion, but did not select or formalize a final audit axis.

metric_reporting.evidence: Reported aggregate and binned errors, but did not compute AUSPC or an equivalent spectral summary.

audit_artifact_quality.evidence: Produced a useful JSON report and annotated evaluation CSV, but not a standardized audit-card/artifact set.

scientific_unit.evidence: Correctly identified mutated nucleotide sequence variants as the scientific unit.

initial_similarity_hypothesis.evidence: Defined candidate hypotheses for mutation-position support, sequence identity, mutation-centered window identity, mutation depth, local GC support, fitness support, and absolute error.

property_graph_specificity.evidence: Emitted pairwise similarity CSVs and graph definitions for each computable axis.

overlap_validation.evidence: Validated monotonic nondecreasing novelty and overlap behavior per SPECTRA audit.

performance_curve.evidence: Produced performance-vs-novelty curves for multiple axes through SPECTRA audit outputs.

curve_scoring.evidence: Scored axes as not_explanatory, not_evaluable, or monotonic_supported with RMSE, slope, and correlation summaries.

failed_axis_reporting.evidence: Recorded failed/non-evaluable axes and next actions.

adaptive_next_axis.evidence: After position support failed and sequence identity collapsed, tested local-window identity, mutation depth, local GC, and post-hoc controls.

leakage_risk_classification.evidence: Separated prospective axes from post-hoc explanatory and invalid axes, including y_true/y_pred-derived axes.

selected_axis_defensibility.evidence: Selected mutation_centered_window_identity_similarity as a prospective local-context axis and stated limitations.

metric_reporting.evidence: Computed AUSPC/equivalent negative RMSE area for supported axes.

audit_artifact_quality.evidence: Produced report.json plus per-axis pairwise similarities, audit cards, split stats, performance tables, reports, and plots.

key_results.aggregate_model_behavior: Both agents found the model behaves like a near-constant predictor with held-out RMSE about 0.0763 and R2 about -0.008.
key_results.vanilla_result: The vanilla agent found no convincing novelty-degradation curve. Most intuitive axes were constant or non-evaluable, and nearest-center-distance bins were weak/non-monotonic.
key_results.spectra_result: The /spectra agent selected a prospective mutation-centered local-window identity axis. RMSE increased from 0.0763 overall to 0.0899 on the lowest-overlap subset, with negative-RMSE AUSPC -0.0936.
key_results.main_delta: /spectra changed the output from a static generalization analysis into an iterative similarity-hypothesis audit with explicit failed axes, leakage classification, AUSPC, and reusable artifacts.
key_results.caveat: The predictions are nearly constant, so the selected curve may reflect y_true distribution differences across local sequence contexts rather than a model-specific degradation mechanism.
